content.rendered: Imran brings over 30 years of strategic leadership, revenue growth, and team empowerment to the helm of AMI’s sales organization. With a proven track record of scaling sales operations, entering new markets, and driving multimillion-dollar growth, Imran leads with a customer-first mindset and is passionate about building high-performance teams and delivering customer-centric solutions. He holds a Master’s degree in Computer Science and Bachelor of Commerce from the University of Karachi in Pakistan.
